meaning: n.位置,场所,特定区域,<美>[电影]外景拍摄场地
examples: What is the exact location of the ship?
I could pinpoint his precise location on a map.
Its geographical location stimulated overseas mercantile enterprise.
Given its location in the Central Business District, Ice House is excellent value.
The company said the updated design with the revised plan was "entirely suited to its location".
